description: Schema for extracting structured data from invoices.

invoiceNumber.description: The unique identifier for the invoice.

issueDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

dueDate.description: The date when the invoice payment is due, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

vendor.description: Information about the vendor or supplier.

name.description: The name of the vendor or supplier.

address.description: The full address of the vendor or supplier, potentially multi-line.

email.description: The email address of the vendor or supplier for billing inquiries.

billTo.description: Information about the buyer or recipient of the invoice.

name.description: The name of the buyer or bill-to entity.

address.description: The full address of the buyer or bill-to entity, potentially multi-line.

lineItems.description: A list of individual items or services billed on the invoice.

description.description: A description of the item or service.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service.

unitPrice.description: The price per unit of the item or service.

amount.description: The total amount for this line item (quantity * unit price).

subtotal.description: The sum of all line item amounts before taxes and other charges.

tax.description: The total tax amount applied to the invoice. If a percentage is present, this field captures the calculated amount.

totalAmountDue.description: The grand total amount due for the invoice, including subtotal and tax.

paymentTerms.description: The specified terms for payment, e.g., 'Net 30'.
